B.C. murder suspect acquitted, confession tossed for 'degrading' police treatment
results.description: A British Columbia man accused of murdering his common-law wife has been acquitted after a judge threw out a confession she says was tainted by the suspect’s “degrading and humiliating” treatment by police.

results.title: Florida 24th District debate: What do you offer as a candidate?

results.title: The Wealth Gap Isn’t About Bad Decisions. It’s About What Nobody Taught You, Says OpenCorp CEO
results.description: Key Facts: Australia's financial literacy gap spans all generations, with the average 50-year-old holding around $200,000 in superannuation — well below the $370,000 needed for a comfortable retirement — whilst Australians under 35 hold just 7% of total household wealth. Gen Z is increasingly turning to social media platforms such as TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram ... Continued

results.title: France Recorded 5,700 More Deaths Than Usual During Its Historic June Heat Wave
results.description: France recorded 5,764 excess deaths during its June heat wave, marking the country's deadliest heat-related mortality event since the devastating 2003 heat wave, according to Public Health France.

results.title: Fire causes significant damage to northeast Calgary home
results.description: Flames tore through a northeast home this afternoon, leaving extensive damage.

results.title: Tragic Assassination of Mexican Mayor Highlights Ongoing Violence
results.description: The assassination of Valentin Lavin, mayor of Temoac, inside town hall underscores the ongoing violence against local politicians in Mexico. This tragic event follows a previous attempt on his life and is part of a disturbing trend, with nearly 100 mayors murdered since 2006. Despite claims of reduced homicides, the country continues to face severe challenges from organized crime. The situation raises concerns about the safety of public officials in regions plagued by drug cartel conflicts. Read on for a deeper look into this alarming issue.

results.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq leads Wall Street losses as crude oil tops $95; Indian markets likely to open weak
results.description: US markets ended lower as rising oil prices reignited inflation concerns, dragging technology stocks. Asian markets traded mostly higher, while GIFT Nifty signalled a weak opening for Indian equities despite regional strength.

results.title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez jumps to front of NH 2028 Dem primary field
results.description: In the latest snapshot of the 2028 presidential race, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-NY, now leads the potential 2028 Democratic primary field in New Hampshire, surpassing former Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg for the first time since the University of New Hampshire Survey Center started polling the race in October 2025.The result follows a late June Saint Anselm poll that found Ocasio-Cortez had surged, but hadn't taken over Buttigieg's lead.The new UNH poll, released July 22, found that 22% of likely 2028 Democratic primary voters said they would vote for Ocasio-Cortez, up from 15% in February. She is followed closely by...
